name: Nephropathy/Kidney Screening Codes
description: CPT, LOINC, and ICD-10-CM codes for nephropathy screening in diabetic patients, including urine albumin-creatinine ratio (UACR), microalbumin tests, eGFR, and evidence of nephropathy treatment with ACE/ARB. Used in the kidney health evaluation (KED) measure.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Urinalysis, by dip stick or tablet reagent; automated, with microscopy
Glomerular filtration rate/1.73 sq M.predicted among non-blacks
Glomerular filtration rate/1.73 sq M.predicted among blacks
Glomerular filtration rate/1.73 sq M.predicted by Creatinine-based formula
Type 2 diabetes mellitus with diabetic chronic kidney disease
